description_long: This is a robust, rectangular toolbox with a hard, molded exterior, likely made from heavy-duty plastic or composite material. The box features reinforced edges and corners, with multiple metal latches on the front for secure closure. Two sturdy, folding handles are attached to the front, designed for easy carrying and transport. The top surface has a recessed area with a visible label or document, possibly for identification or inventory purposes. The overall design suggests it is built for durability and protection of tools or equipment, suitable for use in garages, workshops, or on construction sites. The surface is mostly matte with some subtle texturing, and the color is a dark gray or black.
description: A heavy-duty, rectangular toolbox with reinforced corners, metal latches, and folding handles, finished in dark gray or black. It features a recessed label area on top and is designed for secure storage and transport of tools.
description_view_0: Front view showing two folding handles, three prominent metal latches, and a recessed label area on the top.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the box's depth, ribbed surface, and the edge of the top label; handles and latches are not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat, ribbed surface and no visible handles or latches; the top label is partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the ribbed side and the edge of the top label.
attribute_handle_type: Two folding, rectangular plastic handles with metal reinforcement, fixed to the front for carrying; ergonomic grip design.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Three metal clasp latches on the front, likely spring-loaded for secure closure; no visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Internal compartment configuration is not visible; exterior suggests a single large internal storage area with a hinged lid.
attribute_external_labeling: rectangular paper label on top surface, content not readable
